name: Dental CBCT Segmentation
description: A proof-of-concept MONAI Bundle for 3D dental CBCT segmentation. This bundle is intended to segment regions of interest from CBCT volumes as part of a dental imaging AI workflow.
intended_use: Research and proof-of-concept use only. Not intended for clinical diagnosis or treatment planning.

training_data.description: No validated clinical training dataset is included in this initial bundle skeleton. Future versions should document dataset source, license, annotation protocol, and validation split.

performance.description: No clinical validation metrics are available yet. Future versions should report Dice score, Hausdorff distance, sensitivity, specificity, and validation dataset details.
